sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الإِنْسَانُ بِالرَّاحَةِ حِينَ يَتَحَدَّثُ عَنْ مَشَاعِرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek se osjeća olakšano kada govori o svojim osjećajima.
sentences.translationEn: A person feels relieved when they talk about their feelings.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَتْ نُورُ صَدِيقَتَهَا أَنَّهَا تَشْعُرُ بِالضَّغْطِ.
sentences.translation: Nur je rekla svojoj prijateljici da osjeća pritisak.
sentences.translationEn: Nour told her friend that she was feeling pressured.

sentences.arabic: أَصْغَتِ الصَّدِيقَةُ إِلَيْهَا بِانْتِبَاهٍ وَلَمْ تَقْطَعْ حَدِيثَهَا.
sentences.translation: Prijateljica ju je pažljivo slušala i nije je prekidala.
sentences.translationEn: The friend listened to her attentively and did not interrupt her.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتْ نُورُ بِتَحَسُّنٍ كَبِيرٍ بَعْدَ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Nur se osjetila mnogo bolje nakon razgovora.
sentences.translationEn: Nour felt much better after the conversation.
